detections.name: High Error Rate (Any Service)
detections.description: Elevated ERROR-level events across any application index

detections.name: Brute Force Login Attempts
detections.description: Multiple failed authentication events — security SOC use case
detections.spl_template: index=$INDEX$ action=failure OR status=401 OR event_type=failed_login

detections.name: Slow API Response Time
detections.description: Application performance — requests exceeding SLA threshold

detections.name: Kubernetes Pod Crash Loop
detections.description: Infrastructure / platform ops — container restart storms

detections.name: Firewall Deny Spike
detections.description: NetOps — unusual volume of denied connections

detections.name: Windows Failed Logon (ES)
detections.description: Enterprise Security style detection — Windows auth failures
